description: Cashback Hive is a cashback shopping service focused on deals and coupons. Its publicly discoverable developer integration surface is an MCP server for accessing Cashback Hive deals and coupon functionality.
summary: Cashback Hive exposes an OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://mcp.cashbackhive.com/mcp`; no public HTTP API, GraphQL API, or CLI documentation was found on the domain.

surfaces.name: Cashback Hive: Deals & Coupons MCP server
